pages.name: Hub CDP
pages.purpose: Halaman hub Competency Development Platform — 4 kartu navigasi ke fitur PROTON inti.

pages.name: Plan IDP / Silabus
pages.purpose: Lihat silabus kurikulum PROTON (kompetensi>sub>deliverable) + dokumen coaching guidance per Bagian/Unit/Track.
pages.roles: Coachee (locked ke bagian assignment) | L4 SectionHead/SrSpv (locked ke section) | Coach (guidance per coachee-map) | HC/Admin (semua)

table.source: ProtonKompetensiList > SubKompetensiList > Deliverables (render JS setelah Muat Data, butuh 3 filter set)

pages.dataSource: ProtonKompetensiList, ProtonTracks, CoachingGuidanceFiles, ProtonTrackAssignments, GetSectionUnitsDictAsync (shared dep - sumber bug filter Dev kalau OrganizationUnits belum normalisasi)

pages.name: Coaching PROTON (core)
pages.purpose: Halaman inti monitoring deliverable PROTON: scope per-role, approval 3-tier (SrSpv>SectionHead>HC), upload/submit evidence, batch action.
pages.roles: Scope per RoleLevel: <=3 HC/Admin/Direktur/VP/Manager (semua coachee) | 4 SectionHead/SrSpv (section) | 5 Coach (coachee ter-map) | 6 Coachee (own, banner NoActiveAssignment). Aksi gated: approve/reject=RolesReviewerAndAbove, HCReview=HC,Admin, upload/submit/edit/delete/export=RolesCoachAndAbove

pages.name: Proton History
pages.purpose: Daftar pekerja PROTON + status kelulusan per tahun (Tahun 1/2/3 badge) + progress, drill ke detail riwayat.
pages.roles: Scope per level (<=3 semua, 4 section, 5 coach-map, 6 redirect own). Export gated RolesReviewerAndAbove
pages.dataSource: ProtonTrackAssignments, ProtonFinalAssessments (penanda Lulus - relevan bug v25.0 Tahun1/2), ProtonDeliverableProgresses, Users

pages.name: Proton Dashboard
pages.purpose: Dashboard monitoring agregat PROTON: stat coachee/approval/completed + 2 chart + tabel progress tim. Coachee lihat sub-model sendiri.
pages.roles: Coachee branch (BuildCoacheeSubModelAsync) vs non-Coachee progress branch (BuildProtonProgressSubModelAsync scoped per role)

table.source: ProtonDeliverableProgresses agregat per coachee (Team Deliverable Progress)

pages.liveNote: CONSOLE ERROR live: 'ReferenceError: Chart is not defined' @ Dashboard:560 -> Chart.js tak ter-load, 2 chart ('Competency Level Granted Over Time' + 'Deliverable Status') TIDAK render. Caught Playwright runtime (grep/build tak deteksi). Chart 'Competency Level Granted' = fitur yang v25.0 A-3 matikan (dormant).

pages.name: Deliverable detail
pages.purpose: Detail 1 deliverable: info coachee/kompetensi, approval chain 3-tier, evidence coach (+coaching session), riwayat status timeline.

flow.back: breadcrumb+tombol 'Kembali ke IDP Plan' (KE PlanIdp, BUKAN ke CoachingProton asal)

pages.roles: Coachee (own) | L1-3 full | L4 section-scoped (Forbid lintas section) | L5 Coach (mapped) | else Forbid
pages.liveNote: Breadcrumb='IDP Plan / Deliverable' + tombol balik ke PlanIdp, tapi entry sebenarnya dari CoachingProton/Dashboard -> drill balik tak ke asal (calon flow gap). Display 'Kesimpulan: Kompeten secara mandiri' vs opsi Edit dropdown 'Kompeten'/'Perlu Pengembangan' (calon label inkonsistensi).

pages.name: Histori Detail
pages.purpose: Detail riwayat PROTON 1 pekerja: bio + accordion per Tahun (status + drill).
pages.roles: L<=3 semua | L4 same-section (Forbid lain) | L5 mapped (Forbid lain) | L>=6 own only (Forbid lain)
pages.liveNote: Live: 'Tahun 1' muncul DUA kali keduanya 'Dalam Proses' (kemungkinan 2 assignment tahun sama / duplikat) = calon data-integrity gap. Tahun 2/3 tak tampil (no assignment).

pages.name: Edit Coaching Session
pages.purpose: Edit catatan/kesimpulan/result 1 sesi coaching yang sudah ada.

columns: editable: Catatan Coach (textarea), Kesimpulan (Kompeten/Perlu Pengembangan), Result (Need Improvement/Suitable/Good/Excellence)

pages.name: Certification Management
pages.purpose: Daftar semua sertifikat pelatihan+asesmen pekerja (gabungan Training+Assessment) dengan status validitas + renewal.
pages.roles: BuildSertifikatRowsAsync(l5OwnDataOnly:true) - L5 own only, lain scoped. Export Excel gated Admin,HC (ExportSertifikatExcel)

table.source: BuildSertifikatRowsAsync gabung Training + Assessment cert, paginated PaginationHelper

pages.liveNote: Export Excel + link nama pakai href=# (JS-driven) - perlu verifikasi handler tak dead. Renewal toggle in-page (modul renewal out-of-scope analisa).

pages.name: Master Silabus (ProtonData/Index)
pages.purpose: Admin/HC kelola silabus PROTON (kompetensi>sub>deliverable CRUD) + coaching guidance file per Bagian/Unit/Track + tab Status ringkasan.

columns: Tab Guidance: file list per Bagian>Unit>Track

pages.liveNote: Tab Status: baris RFCC/DHT-HMU/NGP/GAST muncul tapi sel Silabus+Guidance KOSONG (tak ada count/badge) walau data silabus ada (terlihat di PlanIdp). Calon data-integrity/dead-display gap (cocok temuan memory 'StatusData status bolong'). Awalnya stuck 'Memuat...' lalu render kosong.

pages.name: Override Progress (ProtonData/Override)
pages.purpose: Admin/HC override status progress deliverable coachee manual (mis. fix rejected / pending HC nyangkut).
pages.liveNote: Judul page 'Deliverable Progress Override' (spec keliru sebut 'Override Silabus'). Muat Data disabled sampai 3 filter dipilih.

pages.name: Import Silabus (ProtonData/ImportSilabus)
pages.purpose: Admin/HC bulk tambah/update silabus via upload Excel (template + drag-drop).

columns: Doc 'Format Kolom Template': Bagian/Unit/Track (Info auto), Kompetensi/SubKompetensi/Deliverable (Wajib), Target (Opsional)

pages.liveNote: Proses Import disabled sampai file dipilih (guard OK).

pages.name: Coach×Coachee Mapping
pages.purpose: Admin assign coach ke coachee + ProtonTrackAssignment (bagian/unit/jabatan/track), grouped per coach, plus graduation.

actions.label: Graduated
actions.endpoint: mark graduated (gate Tahun3 lulus - relevan v25.0 PCOMP-08)

pages.liveNote: Overlap audit Phase 356 (AF-1..7, eligibility per-unit). Tombol 'Graduated' = graduation gate (v25.0 ingin gate Tahun3 lulus). Aksi Nonaktifkan/Graduated tanpa modal konfirmasi terlihat (cek UX gap).

pages.name: Coach Workload
pages.purpose: Monitoring distribusi beban coach (rasio coachee/coach) + threshold overload + saran penyeimbangan.
pages.liveNote: Ada 'Grafik Beban Coach' (legend Normal/Mendekati Batas/Overloaded) - cek apakah pakai Chart.js (sama lib yang gagal di Dashboard) - tak ada console error di crawl ini, tapi perlu verifikasi render grafik.

gaps.title: Chart.js tak ter-load — 2 grafik Dashboard mati total
gaps.detail: Live Playwright: 'ReferenceError: Chart is not defined' @ Dashboard:560. Grafik 'Competency Level Granted Over Time' + 'Deliverable Status' tak render (area kosong). Grep/build tak deteksi (runtime JS). Catatan: chart 'Competency Level Granted' memang akan dimatikan v25.0 A-3, tapi 'Deliverable Status' fitur valid yang rusak.

gaps.title: Tab Status ProtonData: sel Silabus/Guidance kosong walau data ada
gaps.detail: Live: baris RFCC/DHT-HMU/NGP/GAST muncul tapi kolom Silabus & Guidance KOSONG (tanpa count/badge), padahal silabus terlihat di PlanIdp. Admin tak bisa lihat coverage silabus/guidance per bagian. Cocok temuan memory 'StatusData status bolong'; kemungkinan terkait agregasi GetSectionUnitsDictAsync.

gaps.title: Exam Tahun 1/2 lulus tak pernah berstatus 'Lulus'
gaps.detail: Status 'Lulus' bergantung ProtonFinalAssessment yang (pra-v25.0) cuma terbit lewat interview Tahun 3 -> exam Tahun 1/2 yang lulus tak tercatat Lulus. SUDAH DIALAMATKAN milestone v25.0 Phase 358 (penanda kelulusan via ProtonCompletionService). Dicatat agar tak dobel-hitung.

gaps.title: Dashboard satu-satunya page monitoring tanpa export
gaps.detail: CoachingProton (3 export), HistoriProton (Export Excel), CertificationManagement (Export Excel), CoachWorkload (Export Excel) semua punya export. Dashboard tidak. Inkonsisten untuk page agregat yang justru paling layak di-export.

gaps.title: Deliverable: tombol/breadcrumb balik ke PlanIdp, bukan ke page asal
gaps.detail: Entry Deliverable dari CoachingProton 'Lihat Detail' atau Dashboard drill, tapi breadcrumb='IDP Plan / Deliverable' + tombol 'Kembali ke IDP Plan'. User dibuang ke PlanIdp (page beda konteks), bukan kembali ke daftar coaching asal.

gaps.title: HistoriProtonDetail: 'Tahun 1' tampil dobel (keduanya Dalam Proses)
gaps.detail: Live: accordion 'Tahun 1' muncul 2x dengan status sama 'Dalam Proses'. Indikasi 2 ProtonTrackAssignment tahun sama / kurang dedup di view. Membingungkan + indikasi data assignment tak bersih.

gaps.title: Aksi Nonaktifkan/Graduated tanpa konfirmasi terlihat
gaps.detail: Tombol 'Nonaktifkan' + 'Graduated' di baris mapping = aksi ubah-status penting (graduated bahkan menutup track). Tak terlihat modal konfirmasi sebelum eksekusi. Risiko salah-klik. Perlu verifikasi handler JS apakah ada confirm().

gaps.title: Tombol 'Graduated' belum dipastikan gated oleh kelulusan Tahun 3
gaps.detail: Graduation seharusnya hanya boleh kalau Tahun 3 lulus. SUDAH masuk scope v25.0 (PCOMP-08 graduation gate Phase 359). Dicatat agar tak dobel-hitung; verifikasi state guard saat ini.

gaps.title: CertificationManagement: entry dari Admin tapi breadcrumb/exit ke CDP
gaps.detail: Dicapai dari Admin/Home dashboard, tapi breadcrumb 'CDP / Certification Management' + tombol 'Kembali ke CDP' -> /CDP/Index (hub yang TIDAK punya kartu ke Cert). Lingkar navigasi tak konsisten dengan entry.

gaps.title: Dashboard tanpa search, page sejenis punya
gaps.detail: CoachingProton (Cari kompetensi), HistoriProton (Cari nama/NIP), CoachCoacheeMapping (Cari) punya search box; Dashboard tidak. Minor konsistensi UX.

gaps.title: CertManagement: Export Excel & link nama pakai href=#
gaps.detail: Export Excel + link 'Lihat riwayat sertifikat' pakai href='#' (handler JS). Perlu verifikasi runtime handler benar memanggil ExportSertifikatExcel / buka modal (potensi dead kalau JS gagal). Belum dikonfirmasi klik live.

gaps.title: Gating export tak seragam: Coach bisa export Coaching tapi tidak Histori
gaps.detail: ExportProgress/Bottleneck/CoachingTracking gated RolesCoachAndAbove (Coach boleh), tapi ExportHistoriProton gated RolesReviewerAndAbove (Coach tidak boleh). Bisa intentional, tapi inkonsisten — perlu konfirmasi desain.

roadmap.fix: Load Chart.js (CDN/bundle) di Dashboard + guard init; pisahkan dari chart 'Competency Level Granted' yang akan dimatikan v25.0
Perbaiki StatusData(): isi count Silabus/Guidance per bagian + .fail() handling; verifikasi agregasi GetSectionUnitsDictAsync
Implementasi v25.0 Phase 358 (ProtonCompletionService penanda Exam) + backfill
Tambah tombol Export Excel di Dashboard (reuse pola HistoriProton)
Tombol/breadcrumb balik Deliverable pakai referrer (CoachingProton/Dashboard) bukan hardcode PlanIdp
Dedup assignment per tahun di HistoriProtonDetail (group by TahunKe) + cek data assignment ganda
Gate Graduated by Tahun3 lulus (v25.0 PCOMP-08 Phase 359)
Sesuaikan breadcrumb+tombol balik CertManagement ke Admin (atau tambah kartu Cert di hub CDP)
Tambah search box di Dashboard (opsional, konsistensi)
Verifikasi/klik live handler Export Excel + link nama CertManagement; ganti href=# -> action bila perlu
Tinjau desain gating export Histori vs Coaching; seragamkan kalau memang Coach harus bisa lihat histori coachee-nya
